title: [FIRRTL] Improve Error Message on Uninferred Reset of Uninstantiated Module
body:
Currently, the following FIRRTL Circuit will fail in `InferResets` because of an uninstantiated module. This error is somewhat confusing and it would be better to also indicate that this module is uninstantiated:

```
circuit Foo :
  module Bar :
    input clock : Clock
    input reset : Reset

    skip

  module Foo :

    skip
```

This currently produces:

```
# firtool Tmp.fir
Tmp.fir:2:10: error: 'firrtl.module' op has an abstract reset type port "reset" after InferResets
  module Bar :
         ^
```

h/t @cedric-orban
